creator: val@packett.cool
text:
(In reply to Marco Beishuizen from comment #11)
> today the port got updated (rev. 557447), and this patch unfortunately does not

If you are referring to https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-ports/commit/d2693be40548c337094db5b1747e81984a08eaa3 :

There is no need to apply the 3.0.4 patch anymore after the port has been updated to 3.0.4! ;)

This bug can be closed as Overcome by Events.
